narrative:
Miller City-New Cleveland Lsd (Putnam) school district has 1,521 registered voters, with 44.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 48.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 41.2 percentage points. Registration is trending redder in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -39.8% D−R vs -34.9% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
